summary: Retested AITemplatesPage URL/label fix from iteration_84. Bug is RESOLVED. Location dropdown (/api/authz/locations) now populates with 18 options; Provider dropdown (/api/auth/users?role=doctor) populates with 54 options. Full save round-trip works for both Location and Provider scopes. Saved rows appear in the list with friendly labels (e.g. 'Downtown Clinic (SUN-DT)' and 'lic_852da6d8@ccms.app') — no raw UUIDs. Toast 'Template saved.' shown. Delete round-trip works; list returns to empty state. Test data cleaned up.
critical_code_review_comments: For license-doctor accounts that lack display_name/first_name/last_name, the rendered option label is just the bare email (e.g. 'lic_852da6d8@ccms.app') without a human name prefix. This is by design per the fallback chain in AITemplatesPage.jsx L236-244, and emails remain unique so the admin can still distinguish them — but the UX could be improved by showing e.g. 'Dr. (unnamed) · lic_...@ccms.app' or deriving a short handle from the email local-part. Non-blocking.
seed_data_creation: Created two TEST_ overrides during the round-trip test (TEST_LOC_OVERRIDE_iter85, TEST_PROV_OVERRIDE_iter85). Both deleted post-test — verified empty state on /settings/ai-templates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: AITemplatesPage is now fully functional at /settings/ai-templates for admin. Endpoints used: GET /api/authz/locations (18 visible), GET /api/auth/users?role=doctor (54 docs). Labels render via display_name → first+last → name (unless 'License doctor') → email fallback with ' · email' suffix for disambiguation. Regression spot-check on /scheduling NL quick-book and /clinical scribe coding-suggest was NOT executed in depth here because the fix is a pure URL-string correction isolated to AITemplatesPage.jsx (no shared module touched), and the previous iteration_84 already exercised those flows end-to-end green. Main agent can consider this bug closed.
rca of the issue: Root cause (fixed in prior turn by main agent): AITemplatesPage.jsx was calling non-existent endpoints api.get('/locations') and api.get('/users?role=doctor'), which 404'd silently and left locations/providers arrays empty — so the scope_id Select rendered no options and admins could not create non-tenant overrides. Fix: switched to the correct authenticated paths /authz/locations and /auth/users?role=doctor (both confirmed 200 with non-empty payloads in the browser network log). Also hardened the display label chain to fall back display_name → first+last → name (skipping the placeholder 'License doctor') → email, appending the email suffix for disambiguation when a human name exists. Verified via UI save-and-list round trip for both Location and Provider scopes.
